allow: PowerShell(node --version)
PowerShell(npm --version)
PowerShell(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Where-Object { $_.FullName -notmatch "node_modules|\\.next" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\("c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)\\", ""\) } | Sort-Object)
PowerShell(winget --version)
PowerShell(winget install OpenJS.NodeJS.LTS --accept-source-agreements --accept-package-agreements 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); node --version; npm --version)

PowerShell(Set-ExecutionPolicy -Scope CurrentUser -ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Force; $env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); npm --version)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npm install 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 10)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npm install 2>&1 | Select-String "added|warn EBADENGINE" | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; Test-Path node_modules; \(Get-ChildItem node_modules\).Count)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npx prisma db push 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npx ts-node --compiler-options '{\\"module\\":\\"CommonJS\\"}' prisma/seed.ts 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npm run dev 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20)
PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 5)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npm install autoprefixer --save-dev 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; npm run dev 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 5)
PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 3)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
PowerShell(Stop-Process -Force)
PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -MaximumRedirection 5 -TimeoutSec 10)
PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/vehicules" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15)

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/vehicules" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -First 2 | Format-List marque, modele, statut)
PowerShell(\(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).StatusCode)

PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); Set-Location "c:\\Users\\pc\\Desktop\\New folder \(4\)"; node -e "const { prisma } = require\('./src/lib/prisma'\); prisma.reservation.findMany\({ include: { client: true, vehicule: true, paiements: true } }\).then\(r => console.log\('OK', r.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\).finally\(\(\) => prisma.`$disconnect\(\)\)" 2>&1)

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; $stream = $resp.GetResponseStream\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $text = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $text | Select-String -Pattern '"message":"[^"]{0,200}"' | Select-Object -First 5 })
PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/dashboard" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 } catch { $_.Exception.Message })
